_meta.purpose: Career atom JSON schema — exact field definitions for ingestAtom calls.
_meta.update_instructions: Edit this file to change atom field definitions. Also update openapi_schema.yaml CareerAtom component to match.

action_verb.description: Strong past-tense verb. Choose from the verbs list below.

action_detail.description: What was done — specific, concrete, no filler words. This field drives conflict detection.
action_detail.good_example: CI/CD pipeline build time by switching to parallel GitHub Actions jobs

company.description: Full company name as the user says it.

role.description: Job title at the time of this achievement.

context.description: Background / situation that makes the achievement meaningful. The S in STAR.

stakes.description: Why this mattered — business impact, risk, urgency.

you_specifically.description: User's personal contribution when the work was a team effort.

result_text.description: The outcome — ideally quantified. The R in STAR.
result_text.good_example: Deploy time dropped from 18 min to 11 min; team shipped 2x faster

tools_used.description: Technologies, frameworks, tools. Used for resume keyword matching.

timeframe.description: When this happened. Prefer ISO date (YYYY-MM) or quarter (Q3 2023).

difficulty.description: Subjective difficulty. 'hard' maps to P1 importance in resume ranking.

challenge.description: What made this hard — obstacle, constraint, or ambiguity overcome.

your_decision.description: Key decision or judgment call the user personally made.

team_role.description: User's role in the team: solo=alone, lead=directed others, contributor=part of team.

what_went_wrong.description: Optional — failure or setback, used for behavioral interview prep.

behavioral_tags.description: Behavioral competencies demonstrated. See taxonomy below.

skills_demonstrated.description: Hard and soft skills used. Critical for JD matching in resume generation.

metrics.description: Structured numeric results. Each metric is indexed separately for retrieval.

Metric.timeframe: string — optional, same format as atom timeframe

_meta.purpose: Captures a pivotal choice — what was chosen, what was given up, and why. Use when an answer involves a fork in the road, a tradeoff, or a road not taken.

the_choice.description: What was chosen — concrete, one sentence.
the_choice.good_example: Rejected PwC Strategy offer and stayed for IIT PhD
the_choice.bad_example: Decided to not go to PwC

alternative_not_taken.description: What was given up — the other path.
alternative_not_taken.good_example: PwC Strategy consulting role in Delhi, ₹18L CTC

why_chosen.description: The reasoning — 1-2 sentences. What made this the right call at the time.
why_chosen.good_example: Research felt unfinished; wanted depth over early salary. Also IIT reputation felt more aligned with PM path.

tradeoff.good_example: 4 more years of student stipend; delayed financial independence

outcome.description: How it actually played out — in hindsight.
outcome.good_example: Led to IIT alumni network, IIT brand on resume, and eventual PM placement

timeframe.description: When the decision was made. YYYY-MM or year.

life_domain.description: Which life area this decision belongs to.

_meta.purpose: Captures a formative experience — something that happened and genuinely changed how you think, operate, or see yourself. Use when an answer is about growth through adversity, identity shifts, or values crystallizing.

experience_text.description: What happened — concrete, 1-2 sentences. NOT what changed — just the event.
experience_text.good_example: Failed GATE mains by 3 marks in my final attempt after 18 months of preparation
experience_text.bad_example: I had a hard time during IIT

what_changed.description: How this experience changed the way you think, lead, or operate — 1-2 sentences.
what_changed.good_example: Stopped defining self-worth by singular performance events. Learned to reframe failure as data, not verdict.

value_crystallized.description: The specific value, belief, or principle that hardened after this experience.
value_crystallized.good_example: Resilience through reframing, not denial. Outcome ≠ identity.

timeframe.description: When this happened. YYYY-MM or year.

life_domain.description: Which life area this formative experience belongs to.
